body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 

Refactored reproducibility infrastructure to
* output human-readable relative rms deviations for prognostic variables
* only error when rms deviations exceed a small tolerance (not bitwise comparison)
* fold `ClimaReproducibilityTests` utilities into `ClimaAtmos` (since it was a few functions to compute mse errors anyway, and no one else was using it, so keeping it inside `ClimaAtmos` makes it more easily changeable and maintainable)

No changes to source code or model function.

## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->


<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

----
- [ ] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Reproducibility infrastructure refactor

body: This speeds up one of the [kernels 2x](https://github.com/petebachant/clima-local-geometry/blob/7f5f0b0650429d7550da17fdffc9b5c7d7102ec1/notebooks/compare-kernels.ipynb) and a prog. EDMF 1M simulation with [this config](https://github.com/petebachant/clima-local-geometry/blob/7f5f0b0650429d7550da17fdffc9b5c7d7102ec1/config/climaatmos_progedmf_1m.yml) by [6%](https://github.com/petebachant/clima-local-geometry/blob/7f5f0b0650429d7550da17fdffc9b5c7d7102ec1/notebooks/analyze-logs.ipynb). Kernel: ```julia @. ᶜmp_tendency⁰ = microphysics_tendencies_quadrature_1m( BMT.Microphysics1Moment(), SG_quad, cmp, thp, ᶜρ⁰, ᶜp, ᶜT⁰, ᶜq_tot_safe⁰, ᶜq_liq⁰, ᶜq_ice⁰, ᶜq_rai⁰, ᶜq_sno⁰, ᶜT′T′, ᶜq′q′, correlation_Tq(p.params), ) ``` Difference from `nsys` profiles: Related to #4285 ## TODO - [x] Update tests - [x] Rebase + squash - [ ] Add a prog. EDMF 1M benchmark to CI checks? - [ ] Inspect changes in `ncu`
title: Remove unused variable from `Microphysics1MEvaluator` and use normal loops in `sum_over_quadrature_points`
